title: Avocado Toast
ingredients: Sourdough bread, avocado, lemon juice, chili flakes, sea salt
instructions: Toast the bread, mash avocado with lemon, spread it over the toast, and finish with chili flakes.

title: Tomato Basil Pasta
ingredients: Pasta, cherry tomatoes, basil, garlic, olive oil, parmesan
instructions: Cook pasta, simmer tomatoes with garlic, toss everything together, and top with parmesan.

title: Berry Pancakes
ingredients: Flour, milk, egg, blueberries, strawberries, maple syrup
instructions: Make the batter, cook pancakes until golden, then serve with berries and syrup.

title: Grilled Chicken Salad
ingredients: Chicken breast, romaine, cucumber, tomatoes, vinaigrette
instructions: Grill chicken, slice it thin, and serve over crisp vegetables with vinaigrette.

title: Veggie Tacos
ingredients: Tortillas, black beans, corn, peppers, avocado, lime
instructions: Warm tortillas, fill with beans and vegetables, then top with avocado and lime.

title: Salmon Rice Bowl
ingredients: Salmon, rice, cucumber, edamame, soy sauce, sesame seeds
instructions: Bake salmon, add it to rice with vegetables, and drizzle with soy sauce.

title: Mushroom Risotto
ingredients: Arborio rice, mushrooms, stock, onion, butter, parmesan
instructions: Cook onion and mushrooms, stir in rice, add stock gradually, and finish with butter and parmesan.

title: Breakfast Yogurt Bowl
ingredients: Greek yogurt, granola, banana, berries, honey
instructions: Spoon yogurt into a bowl, add fruit and granola, then drizzle with honey.

title: Garlic Butter Noodles
ingredients: Noodles, butter, garlic, parsley, parmesan, black pepper
instructions: Cook noodles, melt butter with garlic, toss together, and finish with parsley and parmesan.

title: Caprese Sandwich
ingredients: Ciabatta, mozzarella, tomato, basil, pesto, balsamic glaze
instructions: Layer mozzarella, tomato, basil, and pesto on ciabatta, then finish with balsamic glaze.
